name: 43_Social_Network_Analysis_GCN_Cora_ML
query: Habari! Unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mfumo wa uchambuzi wa mtandao wa kijamii kwa kutumia modeli ya GCN na seti ya data ya mtandao wa nukuu wa Cora? Kwanza, hebu tuweke na kusindika seti ya data, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tumia modeli ya GCN kuainisha nodi na rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa ili kupata matokeo bora katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi modeli chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Ukishafanya hivyo, tafadhali hifadhi utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`. Onyesha muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`. Mwisho, unda grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana kwa kutumia D3.js au Bokeh ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`. Itakuwa nzuri pia ikiwa utekelezaji wako unaweza kumruhusu programu kubadilisha kwa urahisi kwenye seti nyingine za data za nukuu. Asante sana kwa msaada wako!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.
Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.
Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.
Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza nodi za kibinafsi na uainishaji wao kwa njia ya nguvu.
Uonyeshaji wa mtandao wa nukuu unapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya madarasa tofauti ya nodi na mahusiano.
Mfumo unapaswa kubuniwa kushughulikia seti za data za nukuu za ziada kwa marekebisho madogo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Cora citation network" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no use of libraries like `torch_geometric`, `dgl`, or any other framework to actually fetch or process the Cora dataset. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings and provides minimal placeholder functions, which does not constitute a real implementation of loading the Cora citation network dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data preprocessing, normalization, or denoising. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without loading any real data, and the `build_transforms()` function returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` without performing any actual transformations. There is no real implementation of normalization (e.g., feature normalization, adjacency matrix normalization) or denoising for the Cora dataset. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file is a minimal stub implementation that does not contain any actual GCN model, hyperparameters, learning rate, or hidden layer size. The training loop is a trivial counter (`score += step`) with no machine learning components whatsoever. There is no evidence of hyperparameter tuning or optimization of any kind.

<UNSATISFIED>: The project tree shows that the `models/saved_models/` directory exists but contains no files. Neither `data_loader.py` nor `train.py` includes any logic to save a model to that directory — `train.py` only saves artifacts to `results/metrics/` and `results/figures/`. There is no saved model file present under `models/saved_models/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual node classification performance metrics (such as accuracy, F1-score, precision, recall, etc.). This indicates the file was created but never populated with real training/evaluation results from the GCN model on the Cora dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kuaminika kwamba faili hii ina maudhui sahihi ya picha ya mtandao wa nukuu. Jaribio la kusoma faili lilirudisha kosa la aina ya picha (`image/png` iliyotambuliwa badala ya `image/jpeg`), na trajectory inaonyesha kwamba hakuna hatua zilizorekodiwa za utekelezaji wa msimbo wa kuunda muundo huo. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu uliundwa na kuhifadhiwa kwa mafanikio.

judge_stats.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The project does not implement an interactive network graph using D3.js or Bokeh. The `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png` file exists, but it is a PNG file (static image), not an interactive visualization. Furthermore, examining the source code reveals that this file was created by `save_expected_artifacts()` in `train.py` as a minimal placeholder — it simply writes the text `'generated by minimal semantic train.py\n'` to a file with a `.png` extension, with no actual visualization logic whatsoever. Neither `data_loader.py` nor `train.py` contains any imports or usage of D3.js or Bokeh. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no interactive network graph was created.
